name: Amish Dressing
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Good quality bread - cut into 1/2 inch cubes
2 1/2 cups Homemade Chicken Broth (or canned broth)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Toast the bread cubes on 2 cookie sheets for 15 minutes, or until golden brown. Transfer to a very large mixing bowl.
3. Remove the bones from the chicken and finely chop the meat in a food processor while the chicken is still warm. Discard the skin.
4. Add the chopped vegetables and chicken meat to the bread, along with the seasonings. Toss.
5. In a medium bowl, beat the eggs; add the evaporated milk and broth. Pour over the bread mixture and blend. The mixture will be quite moist.
6. Allow to stand for 1 hour at room temperature.
7. Preheat oven to 350°F again.
8. Transfer the dressing to an oiled 3-quart glass casserole that is 10 inches in diameter and 3 inches deep (the dressing can be frozen for future use; thaw before baking).
9. Bake the dressing for 2 hours, or until the center puffs up and is golden brown on top.
